segments: John : Hey Tim, nice to meet you! What ' s up? Anything new happening? Tim : Hey John! Great to meet you. discussing collaborations for Harry Potter fan project working on - super excited! Anything interesting happening for you? John : That ' s great! signed with new team - excited for the season! Tim : Woohoo! Congrats on new team. Which team you sign with? John : The Minnesota Wolves! can ' t wait to play with them! Tim : Cool! What position you playing for team? Any exciting games coming up? John : I ' m a shooting guard for team season opener is next week - excited! Tim : Cool! Have any goals in mind? John : Yeah, goal is to improve my shooting percentage. practicing hard make it happen. Tim : Sounds good! What challenges encountered during pre - season training? John : Fitting into new team ' s style of play was challenge during pre - season. Tim : That sounds rough. How are things going with new team? John : Things going well! team has been nice ' having fun. How ' s your fan project coming along? Tim : It ' s been going well! Last week talked to friend fan of Harry Potter figuring out ideas, great to get lost in magical world! John : great! Loving it when people passionate about their work. What of collaborations you involved in for fan project? love talking to people about my sneaker collection. Tim : Thanks! discussing various aspects of Harry Potter universe, like characters, spells magical creatures. great to see fans coming together for this. John : Wow! been to any places related to it? Tim : went to place in London a few years ago - like walking into Harry Potter movie! also went on a tour amazing. been to any of real Potter places? d love to explore them someday! John : No, but it sounds fun! Going to those places on my to - do list.Tim : Definitely add it to your list! s fun experience. Let me know if need any tips for visiting. Bye

Tim : Last night joined fantasy literature forum had great talk about fave books. enriching! John : Wow, great to hear you had a blast talking books! cool to connect with others who share your passion. On different note exciting things happening - - exploring endorsement opportunities. Thinking about possibilities pumps me up. amazing to work with brands do something special. rewarding to have my hard work pay off like this. Tim : Wow, that ' s awesome! Congrats - you must be so stoked! Which brands looking to link up with? John : Thanks! excited about new journey! currently considering sports brands like Nike and Under Armour. great to collaborate with brands related to sports. also open to exploring other brands that align with my values and interests. many options out there, can ' t wait to see where this takes me! Tim : That ' s awesome! gotta be rush having all these options. Can ' t wait to see which brands you choose to work with - gonna be great! John : Thanks! Exciting times ahead! ll keep you updated on which brands I choose. Can ' t wait to see where this journey leads me. Thanks for your support. Tim : Yeah, John! Count on me for support. Can ' t wait to see what ' s up! This is my book collection so far. John : Wow, nice bookshelf! That picture is interesting. What ' s up with it? Tim : Thanks! picture from MinaLima. They created all props for Harry Potter films, love their work. like having a piece of wizarding world at home! John : Wow, having that so cool! Your enthusiasm for it is awesome. You really go for it! Tim : Thanks! have lots of reminders of it - way to escape realityJohn : Do reminders help escape daily grind? Any chance visit more places related to world soon? Tim : Definitely, reminders help. s definitely a chance visiting more HP spots in future. feels like ' m stepping into books! John : sounds awesome! cool get to immerse yourself in that world. glad you found something brings you much joy. Keep diving in enjoying it! Here ' s a pic from recent game. Tim : Wow! That ' s awesome! Were you playing or watching? John : Thanks! was from a game I just played. was in it! was awesome being out there, doing what I love. awesome feeling. Tim : Wow! look so into it in that pic must be awesome playing at that level! Keep rockin ' it! John : Thanks! It ' s a blast. Giving it my all every time m on the court. appreciate your support! Tim : Yeah, keep going! Don ' t give up on dreams. Talk to you later

John : Hey Tim! Good to see you again. much happened in the last month - on and off the court. Last week I scored 40 points, my highest ever, feels like all my hard work ' s paying off. Tim : Congrats on your achievement! I m proud of you. Last week, had nice chat with a Harry Potter fan in California. was magical! John : Thank you! Scoring points was incredible experience. atmosphere was electric, teammates and I were thrilled. pulled off tough win! Tim : Wow, sounds awesome! Winning after game must have felt amazing - what was like? Did celebrate afterward? John : We were all exhausted but happy. After that celebrated at a restaurant, laughing and reliving intense moments - felt amazing! Tim : Wow, sounds like a blast! had incredible time meeting with fellow fan. can feel love when re surrounded by people who share same passion. Does that happen with your sport too? John : Definitely! Being surrounded by teammates equally passionate creates strong bond. We push each other to be our best love for game is infectious. s like having second family. Tim : That s awesome! Having second family through sport must be great feeling. Glad you have that support. mentioned exploring endorsements - made any progress? John : Yeah, I ' m getting somewhere with endorsements. talked to big names, looks promising. Exciting to see what ' s in store! Tim : How manage to connect with these big companies? John : used contacts in basketball industry and marketing skills to make connections. Networking plays big role in getting endorsements grateful for support ve received. Tim : Wow, what endorsements managed to get through networking? John : signed up Nike for basketball shoe and gear deal. also in talks with Gatorade about potential sponsorship.cool to be working with big brands! Tim : Wow, Congrats on deals with Nike and Gatorade! You ' re killing it! Any other brands you re dreaming of working with? John : Thanks! Nike and Gatorade deals have me stoked! always liked Under Armour, working with them would be really cool. Tim : Wow! What kind of stuff you exploring? like good things are coming your way. John : checking out exciting things happening. looking forward to what ' s coming next! This is where I ' m headed. Tim : Wow, amazing view! Where ' s that? What ' s got you excited? John : It ' s Seattle, stoked for my game there next month! one of my favorite cities to explore - super vibrant! Tim : Cool! What do you love about Seattle? John : love energy, diversity, and awesome food of city. Trying local seafood is must! Plus support from fans at games is incredible. Tim : Sounds fab! Seattle is a great and colorful city. always wanted to try the seafood there. Good luck with everything! John : Thanks! Can ' t wait for seafood too. love the ocean. Tim : looks peaceful! favorite beach memory? John : had awesome summer with friends, surfing and riding waves. feeling was unreal! Tim :! How long have you been surfing? John : started surfing five years ago great. love connection to nature. Tim : sounds amazing! connection to nature must be incredible. John : Being out in the water can be amazing. waves, wind, super exciting and free - feeling. Nature ' s pretty special. Tim : awesome! don ' t surf, but reading a great fantasy book helps me escape and feel free. John : Cool! find our own way to escape and feel free! Tim : Yeah! great to find stuff that makes us happy and feel free.s like bliss for me when I do this in a comfy spot. like being in another world, same as surfing is for you. John : Yeah! moments of happiness and freedom amazing. Let find our own bliss. Tim : Sure thing! what makes life awesome! John : Yeah. Awesome catching up! Bye

Tim : Hey John! How ' ve you been? Something awesome happened - I m writing articles about fantasy novels for online mag. rewarding! John : Hey Tim! Congrats on opportunity to write about what you ' re into! How did it happen? Tim : Thanks! found this opportunity on fantasy lit forum thought it ' d be perfect since I love fantasy. shared ideas with magazine they liked them! awesome to spread my love of fantasy. John : Congratulations! awesome. What kind of articles you been writing? Tim : Thanks! been writing about different fantasy novels, studying characters, themes making book recommendations. John : Awesome! rewarding to delve into your books and chat about them. any favorite books you love writing about? Tim : For sure! Harry Potter and Game of Thrones are amazing - I ' m totally hooked! could chat about them forever! John : remember you telling me about Harry Potter! funny story. Anthony and I went to this charity thing ended up in intense Harry Potter trivia contest. did alright, this one super - nerd there took home this as a prize. Tim : looks great! signature is sweet! been reading anything? John : been reading this inspiring book reminds me to keep dreaming. Tim : Books can inspire help us keep our dreams alive. Keep it up! John : Thanks! They do. want to keep reaching for new goals. Tim : Same here! John : Have fun with your writing! Catch you later! Tim : Thanks! ll enjoy writing them. Take care and talk soon

Tim : Hey John! Long time no see! Been super busy lately. Guess what? Just skyped with that Harry Potter fan I met in CA had great time. talked characters maybe collab - ing - cool to talk to someone who gets it. You? Anything new going on? John : Hi Tim! Nice to hear from you. Glad you could reconnect. As for me, lots of stuff happened since we last talked. Last week had crazy game - crazy intense! won it by tight score. Scoring last basket hearing crowd cheer was awesome! Tim : Nice work! Bet felt awesome to score basket have crowd going wild. Must have adrenaline rush! manage to capture any other photos from game? John : Thanks! amazing rush just one I showed you. We were so hyped! Tim : Awesome! Winning tough game must have exhilarating experience! John : Our team bond is awesome makes hard work worth it. Tim : s incredible how team creates strong ties. support like that important. John : Thanks! You nailed it! Having strong team / support is key - s like a family away from home. We push each other to improve, thankful for them. Tim : great! supportive team like family is awesome. Having people who motivate you and stick by you is priceless. John :! They encourage me when I ' m down too. s not just in my sport, but in other aspects of life too. hang out a lot ' s great having that bond. Tim :, having another family is great. helps with my home life and hobbies. John : Having someone to support and motivate you important, whether ' s in sports or any other aspect of life.know you ' ve found your peace in reading fantasy books - ' s amazing! What book are you currently reading? Anything stood out to you? Tim : Thanks for asking! I ' m reading a fantasy book captivates me. takes me to another world where on edge of my seat imagination soars. amazing how books can transport us like that. John : Books can be captivating, taking us on incredible journeys! What ' s name of it? Tim : It ' s a book by Patrick Rothfuss ' awesome! author builds world and characters is amazing. You should read it! John : Sounds cool! check it out. Thanks for recommendation! Tim : No problem! Let me know what you think after you read it. John : Yep ' ll let you know once ' m done reading it. Thanks! Tim : hope you like it. Chat soon! John : Me too. Talk to you soon

John : Hey Tim, sorry I missed you. Been a crazy few days. Took a trip to new place - ' s been amazing. Love the energy there. Tim : Hey John, no worries! I get how life can be busy. Where did you go? Glad you had great time! Exploring new places can be inspiring fun. recently went to an event fantastic. Being with other fans who love it too was special. you ever gone to an event related to something you like? John : was in Chicago, awesome! had much energy locals were friendly. great to experience other cultures connect with new folks. Tim : Wow, Chicago sounds great! refreshing to try something new connect with people from different backgrounds. ever been to a sports game felt real connection with other fans? John : Yeah! nothing like energy in stadium during game. Everyone ' s cheering, chanting, getting excited. special experience! Tim : can imagine thrill of being in that atmosphere. Must ' ve been amazing experience for you! BTW, been writing more articles lets me combine my love for reading and joy of sharing great stories. ' s my latest one! John : That s awesome! come across any interesting books lately? Tim : Thanks! " The Name of the Wind " is great. s fantasy novel with great magician and musician protagonist. world - building and character development are good. worth a read if looking for something captivating! John : book sounds awesome! Love good fantasy with strong characters cool world - building. Cheers for suggestion. Adding it to my list. These are my lucky basketball shoes. They ' ve been with me through good and bad. Every mark has a story. Tim : Your shoes must have a lot of stories behind them. Want to share some with me? John : Yes, these been with me on my journey since the beginning. All successes, failures, friends - have so many stories to tell.They ' re more than just a pair of shoes, symbolize resilience, determination love for the game. They remind me of what I ' ve achieved and how far I ' ve come. Tim : Those shoes are special. They show your hard work successes amazing times with basketball. ' s awesome how meaningful objects can become. inspiring. How did you get into the game? John : Thanks! Basketball has a part of my life ever since I was a kid. d watch NBA games with my dad dream of playing on big courts. When I turned ten, dad signed me up for a local league, I ' ve been playing ever since. kept playing through middle and high school before earning college scholarship. after college, drafted by a team my dream come true! Tim : made your childhood dream come true. s impressive how your dedication hard work paid off. s passions shape our lives. any big goals for your basketball career? John :! Winning a championship is my number one goal. want to make a difference away from court, like through charity or inspiring people. Basketball great to me, want to give something back. Tim : Winning a title making a difference off the court is inspiring. How plan to kick off your charity work? John : teaming up with local organization helps disadvantaged kids with sports and school. hoping to use my platform to have positive impact on community inspire others. Tim : Making a difference like that is truly amazing. can ' t wait to see impact ' ll have. All the best for your charity work! John : Thanks! appreciate support. means a lot. excited to work hard make positive impact. Tim : No worries. I ' m here to support you. got tons of determination and passion! Keep it up - you ' re gonna make a difference! John : Thanks! Your words mean a lot. I ' ll do my best! Tim : Glad I could help' got this! John : Thanks! Talk to you later

John : Hey Tim! We had wild few days since we talked. met back up with teammates on 15th after my trip it was amazing! Everyone missed me. atmosphere was electric I felt welcome being back with them. ' m lucky to be a part of this team! Tim : Wow, John, sounds amazing! happy they gave you warm welcome back. ' s special feeling when you realize you share same passions and talents with others. ' s like finding your true place in world. John : Thanks! Wow, incredible experience. Being around people who share same love for basketball creates special kind of bond. Have you ever felt like you truly belonged somewhere? Tim : Yeah, definitely. felt like I belonged a few times, but last month at event was one of my favorites. Everyone shared same love for it felt like being in a world where everyone understood it. m thankful for those experiences - s great to know people out there who appreciate and share my interests. John : Cool! s great when you find a group that appreciates same things. adds something special to our lives. any exciting plans or events coming up? Tim : no big events coming up, but hoping to attend a book conference next month. interesting gathering of authors, publishers and book lovers talk about favorite novels and new releases. excited to go because ' ll help me learn more about literature create stronger bond to. John : You ' re a real bookworm! would awesome to go to a book conference with you. Check out this photo of what my teammates gave me when we met. s sign of our friendship and all love we have for each other. Tim : That ' s so cool of your teammates. Did they sign it for special reason? John : Thanks! They signed it to show our friendship and appreciation. s great reminder of our bond. Tim : That ' s really cool. s great have something to remind you of your friends.Keeping their energy support with you is always nice. John : Having something like this ball to remind me of bond support from my teammates is comforting. nice reminder of why I started playing basketball my journey. motivates me to stay strong give it my all. Tim : That ' s so sweet. ' s great to have something meaningful to keep you motivated. I ' ll keep that in mind next time need a push to reach my goals. John : motivating to have something reminds you of why you started, having supportive people around is like having cheer team helps you through tough times. Tim : Yeah ' s true. Having them there to cheer you on can be powerful source of strength. John : having that support encourages me to give it my all never give up. s awesome feeling! Tim : ' s awesome how much strength people can get from each other. Bye

John : Hey Tim! Long time no talk. Hope you ' re doing great. Crazy things going on in my life. other day found new gym to stay on my b - ball game. Staying fit essential to surviving pro ball, had to find something fits the bill. Finding right spot was tough but here we are! Tim : Hey John! good to hear from you. Staying fit important. Must be cool to practice there. Any issues you had when you got it? John : ' s great training here. gym is awesome, but had to overcome hurdle of adapting and tweaking my routine. Finding right balance was tricky, but eventually got the hang of it. Tim : Nice one! can be tough getting used to new routine, but once figure it out gets easier. How find that balance? John : Thanks! Took trial and error figured out schedule with both basketball stuff and strength training to balance it out. Listening to my body giving it enough rest made easier to push myself during practice but look after me. ' s my workout plan. helps with staying on track. Tim : Nice job! Impressive plan you ' ve got there! thought it out. Why include strength training in your routine? John : Thanks! Strength training important for basketball builds muscle increases power, prevents injuries. helps me become more explosive, essential in games. boosts my athleticism. Tim : makes sense! Your holistic approach numerous benefits. strength training positive impact on basketball performance? John :! Incorporating strength training changed the game for, improving shooting accuracy, agility, speed gave me upper hand over opponents helped me up my game gave confidence to take on whatever comes my way. Tim : Awesome! Gaining confidence on the court must feel great. s cool how strength training can benefit you. You ' re doing great in both basketball and fitness, keep it up! John : Thanks! Appreciate your support.It ' s been a journey, but happy with progress. Excited to see what ' s next. What about you? How have you been? Tim : Things been great since we last talked - focusing on school reading fantasy books. s nice way to take a break from all stress. also started learning how to play piano - ' s a learning curve, but satisfying seeing progress I make! Life ' s good. John : Wow! You ' re staying busy and having fun. Learning to play this is awesome - ' s such a beautiful instrument. any favorite songs like playing on it? Tim : Thanks! love playing different songs on piano, but my favorite one to jam to is theme from a movie I enjoy. brings back lots of great memories. John : Wow, s cool! Music has way of bringing back memories evoking emotions, doesn ' t it? Almost like taking us back in time. Could you tell me more about that film and memories it brings up for you? Tim :, " Harry Potter and the Philosopher ' s Stone " is special to me. first movie from the series brings back great memories. Watching it with my family was amazing. so magical! John : Wow, sounds great, Tim! love that first movie too, have whole collection! was so magical! Must ' ve been a dream watching it with your family. Tim : dream come true! Watching that movie with my family was awesome ' d all get comfy with snacks and a blanket be totally absorbed. special memory! John : Cool! Cherish those family moments - ' irreplaceable. Family time is great! Mine gets together all the time too. Tim : Family time means a lot to me. photo is from special day when all got together to eat. great day full of love and laughter! John : Wow, looks like such a great day! any favorite Thanksgiving traditions? Tim : Thanksgiving ' s always special for usWe love prepping feast talking about what we ' re thankful for. Plus watching movies afterwards - best! John : Thanksgiving dinner with family sounds great! any favorite movies watch together? Tim : During Thanksgiving usually watch few movies. love " Home Alone " - always brings lots of laughs! John : That ' s classic! What other movies watch during holidays? Tim : also watch " Elf " during holidays. makes us laugh get us feeling festive! John : Those are awesome! Any other holiday movies enjoy watching? Tim : love " The Santa Clause " too - s so heartwarming gets us all feeling festive! John : " The Santa Clause " is classic! so sweet captures Christmas magic. one of movies gets us all feeling festive. This was our tree last year. Tim : Yep, it really does. tree pic looks awesome! must add much holiday cheer to your house. This was ours. John : That looks awesome! Where did you get this tree? Tim : decorated this tree myself, going all out with Harry Potter theme! It was a blast! John : themed tree looks amazing! know how to get the vibes just right! Tim : Thanks! fun project happy with how it turned out. John : Glad you had fun! Tim : Great catching up! Take care, talk soon. John : Catch ya later! Talk soon. Take care enjoy rest of your day.

Tim : Hey John, this week ' s been busy for me. Assignments and exams overwhelming. I ' not giving up though! trying to find way to juggle studying with my fantasy reading hobby. How have you been? John : Hey Tim! know stress of exams and homework, but you got this! I ' doing OK, cheers for asking. Last week visited home caught up with family and old friends. had great time talking about our childhood - reminds me of good ol ' times! Tim : Thanks for the pic! group looks like great squad. How long did you all play together? John : We were teammates for four years in high school, played together for quite some time. ever been part of a sports team? Tim : Nope, never been on a sports team. m more into reading and fantasy novels. love sinking into different magical worlds. s reasons love traveling to new places, to experience different kind of magic. John : Wow, Tim, awesome book collection! cool to escape to different worlds with hobby. love discovering new cities - check out this pic from trips to New York City! Tim : Wow! skyline looks amazing - been wanting to visit NYC. How was it? John : Thanks! amazing. Everywhere you go ' s something new and exciting. Exploring city trying all restaurants awesome. must - visit! Tim : Adding NYC to my travel list sounds like great adventure! heard ' s so much to explore and try out. Can ' t wait to visit! John : Trust me, NYC is amazing! s got so much to check out - culture, food - you won ' t regret it. s adventure you ' ll never forget! Tim : Woohoo! Sounds like fun place with lots of potential. Can ' t wait to experience it for myself! John : Awesome! Can ' t wait to hear when you are going. Let me know sure can help you out.Tim : Yep ' ll let you know! Thanks for helpful. John : Sure thing! Any need help don ' t hesitate to reach out. Tim : Thanks! Your support means a lot me. Bye

Tim : Hey John, it ' s been a few days! got a no for summer job wanted wasn ' t great but staying positive. On your NYC trip, any troubles? How handle them? John : Hey Tim! Sorry to hear about job, but your positivity will help find something great! My trip went okay - had trouble figuring out subway at first, then easy after someone helped explain it. How about you? Anything new ve tackled? Tim : Thanks! Appreciate your encouragement. Yesterday, tackled something new - gave presentation in class. was nervous but made it. Small step, feels like progress. John : Cool, Tim! Taking plunge and presenting can be tough, but awesome work! Progress is progress, keep it up. By been trying out cooking recipes. Made this tasty soup recently - real good! Tim : Wow, looks great! How did you make it? have a recipe you can share? John : Thanks, made it up on spot don ' t have a recipe. Tim : That ' s ok! can look some up. Can tell me what spices you used in soup? John : added some sage for nice flavor. Enjoy! Tim : Thanks! Excited to try this. Love experimenting with spices. By been to Universal Studios? Planning a trip there next month. John : Cool! Haven ' t been there yet, heard great things about Universal Studios. on my bucket list. you been before? Tim : Nope, first time going. super stoked for Harry Potter stuff. Can ' t wait! John : Cool! It ' s gonna be a blast, like stepping into another world. Have great time! Tim : Thanks! ' ll definitely have a blast. ' ll let you know how it goes! John : Great! Can ' t wait to hear about it. Have a safe trip! Tim : Thanks! ll make sure to have a safe trip.John : Bye! Take care catch up soon! Tim : Take care! Can ' t wait to catch up. Talk soon

John : Hey Tim, been a while! How ya been? Tim : Hey John! Great to hear from you. Been busy with things, how about you? John : Yeah, something cool happened! attended a local restaurant with new teammates last week. great getting to know them better. Tim : Good support is essential. How do you feel about them? John : They ' re great friends. connected over our shared love for basketball had ton of fun. Tim : Sounds awesome. Having friends who share your hobbies can be fun. Any exciting plans with them? John : planning to take a team trip next month to explore new city have fun. Can ' t wait! Tim : sounds great! Exploring new cities is always much fun. Where are you headed? John : still deciding on destination. any suggestions? Tim : Edinburgh, Scotland great for magical vibe. s birthplace of Harry Potter has awesome history and architecture. ' s beautiful city. What do you think? John : sounds like a great idea! haven ' t been to Edinburgh yet, but sounds like place worth considering for our trip. Thanks for suggestion! Tim : Glad you liked it. Let know if need any more suggestions. John : Thanks! ll reach out if need more suggestions. Appreciate the help! Here ' s a pic I snapped during one practices. sunset looked amazing on court. Moments like these make me grateful for my basketball career. Tim : Wow looks amazing! What love most about your basketball career? John : Thanks! love playing pro ball - constant challenge keeps me growing. nothing like seeing myself get better beating goals. playing with my teammates having fans cheer is awesome. Basketball gives me great sense of satisfaction and purpose. Tim : s great you have passion helps you grow reach your goals. Achieving and feeling fulfilled must be amazinghave any specific targets or goals you ' re working towards? John : Definitely! focusing on better shooting making more of impact on court. want to be known as a consistent performer and help my team. Off the court, also looking into more endorsements building my brand. important for me to think about life after basketball. Tim : Awesome! s great you have goals both on and off the court. s wise to think about future and building your brand. What your thoughts on life after basketball? John : ve thought about it a lot. want to use my platform to make positive difference inspire others - maybe start a foundation do charity work. important to me to make most of chances I get leave meaningful legacy. Tim : Wow, ' s amazing. Good on you for wanting to make a difference motivate others. ' sure you ' ll succeed! anything I can do to support you? John : Thanks! trying to figure out how to pick the right ones - any advice on? Tim : When picking endorsements, they align with your values and brand. Look for a company that shares your desire to make a change help others. important endorsement feels authentic to your followers. John : Sounds like good advice! wondering if any book recommendations for my trip? Tim : Yeah! d love this fantasy novel by Patrick Rothfuss. ' s a book ' ll take you to different world. Great for you when ' re traveling. Have fun! John : Thanks! ll check it out - looks like great book to read while traveling. Can ' t wait to dive into it! Here ' s a photo of my bookshelf. can see some of books I ' ve read and enjoyed. Tim : Great bookshelf! saw that you had " The Alchemist " on there, one of my favorites. Did enjoy it? John :, I read that book loved it! made me think about life how important to follow one ' s dreams.recommend it! Tim : Glad liked it! " The Alchemist " worth it. John : Thanks! Take care! Tim : Have fun! Take care talk you soon

Tim : Hey John! Awesome catchin ' up with you! A lot ' s changed since last time. John : Hey, Tim! Good to hear from you., a lot has been going on with me. My girlfriend and I had amazing emotional wedding ceremony last week. Tim : Congrats! special day! How manage to have ceremony during these times? John : Thanks! lucky to find a lovely greenhouse venue for smaller, more intimate gathering. to follow necessary safety protocols ensure everyone felt safe. wonderful to have our loved ones celebrate with us.
